requirement_topic.en: Ecuador Grid Parameters — 60 Hz / 120/240 V Split-Phase (LV) and ARCERNNR / CNEL Grid-Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 厄瓜多尔电网参数——60 Hz / 120/240 V分相低压及ARCERNNR / CNEL并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: 厄瓜多電網參數——60 Hz / 120/240 V分相低壓及ARCERNNR / CNEL併網要求

summary.en: Ecuador's distribution grid operates at 60 Hz and 120/240 V split-phase at low voltage — a fundamentally different electrical environment from China's 50 Hz / 220/380 V grid. This is a genuine engineering gap, not a documentation gap. Key requirements include: (1) inverter firmware must be reconfigured for 60 Hz operation — grid-protection relay settings, anti-islanding detection windows, reconnection delays, and harmonic thresholds are all frequency-dependent and must be validated for 60 Hz; (2) voltage settings must be reconfigured for 120/240 V split-phase LV — not 220/380 V; (3) IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance must be validated at 60 Hz and at Ecuador's voltage levels; (4) ARCERNNR (Agencia de Regulación y Control de Energía y Recursos Naturales No Renovables) sets the regulatory framework for grid connection and distributed generation (microgeneración) under its resolutions and technical regulations; (5) distribution companies (CNEL EP and regional distributors) impose technical connection conditions, including protection coordination and meter requirements for net-metering (microgeneración). Inverters not configured and tested for 60 Hz / 120/240 V cannot be lawfully connected to the Ecuador grid regardless of other certifications held.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔配电网在低压端运行于60 Hz、120/240 V分相——与中国50 Hz / 220/380 V电网存在根本性差异。这是真实的工程差距，而非文件差距。主要要求包括：（1）逆变器固件须重新配置为60 Hz运行——电网保护继电器设置、防孤岛检测窗口、重连延迟和谐波阈值均与频率相关，须在60 Hz下验证；（2）电压设置须重新配置为120/240 V分相低压，而非220/380 V；（3）IEC 62116防孤岛合规须在60 Hz及厄瓜多尔电压水平下验证；（4）ARCERNNR（能源及非可再生自然资源管制局）依据其决议和技术法规制定并网及分布式发电（微型发电）的监管框架；（5）配电公司（CNEL EP及区域配电商）规定技术接入条件，包括净电量计量（微型发电）的保护协调和电表要求。未针对60 Hz / 120/240 V配置和测试的逆变器，无论持有何种其他认证，均不得合法接入厄瓜多尔电网。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多配電網在低壓端運行於60 Hz、120/240 V分相——與中國50 Hz / 220/380 V電網存在根本性差異。這是真實的工程差距，而非文件差距。主要要求包括：（1）逆變器韌體須重新配置為60 Hz運行——電網保護繼電器設置、防孤島檢測窗口、重連延遲和諧波閾值均與頻率相關，須在60 Hz下驗證；（2）電壓設置須重新配置為120/240 V分相低壓，而非220/380 V；（3）IEC 62116防孤島合規須在60 Hz及厄瓜多電壓水平下驗證；（4）ARCERNNR（能源及非可再生自然資源管制局）依據其決議和技術法規制定併網及分散式發電（微型發電）的監管框架；（5）配電公司（CNEL EP及區域配電商）規定技術接入條件，包括淨電量計量（微型發電）的保護協調和電表要求。未針對60 Hz / 120/240 V配置和測試的逆變器，無論持有何種其他認證，均不得合法接入厄瓜多電網。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures (must be validated at 60 Hz for Ecuador)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface (60 Hz grid interface requirements)
ARCERNNR resolutions and technical regulations on microgeneración (distributed PV grid connection and net-metering)
CNEL EP and regional distribution-company connection technical conditions
Ecuador LV grid: 60 Hz, 120/240 V split-phase

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specifications), and domestic anti-islanding test results. These Chinese grid-connection documents are based on China's 50 Hz / 220/380 V grid conditions and are entirely inapplicable to Ecuador's 60 Hz / 120/240 V split-phase grid. The frequency difference (50 Hz vs 60 Hz) means firmware anti-islanding and protection relay settings certified under Chinese conditions are not valid for Ecuador without full reconfiguration and retesting. Chinese grid-connection documents provide no presumption of compliance with ARCERNNR or CNEL connection requirements.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）及国内防孤岛测试结果。上述中国并网文件基于中国50 Hz / 220/380 V电网条件，完全不适用于厄瓜多尔60 Hz / 120/240 V分相电网。频率差异（50 Hz对60 Hz）意味着基于中国条件认证的固件防孤岛和保护继电器设置，未经完全重新配置和重新测试，对厄瓜多尔无效。中国并网文件不给予ARCERNNR或CNEL接入要求的任何合规推定。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）及國內防孤島測試結果。上述中國併網文件基於中國50 Hz / 220/380 V電網條件，完全不適用於厄瓜多60 Hz / 120/240 V分相電網。頻率差異（50 Hz對60 Hz）意味著基於中國條件認證的韌體防孤島和保護繼電器設置，未經完全重新配置和重新測試，對厄瓜多無效。中國併網文件不給予ARCERNNR或CNEL接入要求的任何合規推定。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages) — China grid: 220/380 V, 50 Hz
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — 50 Hz-based

gap.en: Gap: China's 50 Hz / 220/380 V grid-connection documents do not satisfy ARCERNNR or CNEL Ecuador grid-connection requirements. The 60 Hz / 120/240 V grid difference is a fundamental engineering reconfiguration requirement, not a paperwork gap. Exporters must: (a) reconfigure inverter firmware for 60 Hz operation and 120/240 V split-phase LV — document all parameter changes; (b) obtain IEC 62116 anti-islanding test evidence validated at 60 Hz and Ecuador voltage levels from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (c) obtain IEC 61727 compliance evidence for the 60 Hz utility interface; (d) confirm protection relay settings and reconnection delays are validated for Ecuador's grid conditions; (e) engage an ARCERNNR-registered engineer and the relevant CNEL or distribution company for the specific microgeneración connection application. Firmware reconfiguration from 50 Hz to 60 Hz is material and may require re-type-testing under IEC 62109-2 and IEC 62116 depending on the extent of the changes.
gap.zh: 差距：中国50 Hz / 220/380 V并网文件不满足ARCERNNR或CNEL厄瓜多尔并网要求。60 Hz / 120/240 V电网差异是根本性的工程重新配置要求，而非文件差距。出口商须：（a）将逆变器固件重新配置为60 Hz运行及120/240 V分相低压——记录所有参数变更；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得在60 Hz及厄瓜多尔电压水平下验证的IEC 62116防孤岛测试证据；（c）取得60 Hz公用电网接口的IEC 61727合规证据；（d）确认保护继电器设置和重连延迟经厄瓜多尔电网条件验证；（e）委托ARCERNNR注册工程师及相关CNEL或配电公司处理具体的微型发电并网申请。从50 Hz到60 Hz的固件重新配置是重大变更，根据变更程度，可能须依据IEC 62109-2和IEC 62116重新进行型式试验。
gap.zht: 差距：中國50 Hz / 220/380 V併網文件不滿足ARCERNNR或CNEL厄瓜多併網要求。60 Hz / 120/240 V電網差異是根本性的工程重新配置要求，而非文件差距。出口商須：（a）將逆變器韌體重新配置為60 Hz運行及120/240 V分相低壓——記錄所有參數變更；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得在60 Hz及厄瓜多電壓水平下驗證的IEC 62116防孤島測試證據；（c）取得60 Hz公用電網介面的IEC 61727合規證據；（d）確認保護繼電器設置和重連延遲經厄瓜多電網條件驗證；（e）委託ARCERNNR登記工程師及相關CNEL或配電公司處理具體的微型發電併網申請。從50 Hz到60 Hz的韌體重新配置是重大變更，根據變更程度，可能須依據IEC 62109-2和IEC 62116重新進行型式試驗。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection under ARCERNNR regulations and CNEL/distribution-company connection conditions; 60 Hz / 120/240 V reconfiguration and IEC 62116 at 60 Hz are non-negotiable engineering and regulatory gates
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's 50 Hz / 220/380 V grid operator requirements but does not transfer to Ecuador's 60 Hz / 120/240 V ARCERNNR/CNEL grid-connection acceptance

source.publisher: ARCERNNR (Agencia de Regulación y Control de Energía y Recursos Naturales No Renovables)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ecuador's 60 Hz / 120/240 V split-phase grid requires full inverter firmware reconfiguration and retesting — this is an engineering requirement, not a paperwork gap. Chinese 50 Hz-based grid-connection documents do not satisfy ARCERNNR or CNEL Ecuador grid-connection requirements. Reconfigure firmware for 60 Hz and 120/240 V, document all parameter changes, and obtain IEC 62116 anti-islanding test evidence at 60 Hz from an ILAC-accredited laboratory before engaging with ARCERNNR and the relevant CNEL or distribution-company connection process. Verify current ARCERNNR microgeneración regulations and CNEL connection technical conditions directly at controlrecursosyenergia.gob.ec before finalising the equipment compliance package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 厄瓜多尔60 Hz / 120/240 V分相电网要求逆变器固件完全重新配置并重新测试——这是工程要求，而非文件差距。基于50 Hz的中国并网文件不满足ARCERNNR或CNEL厄瓜多尔并网要求。在推进ARCERNNR及相关CNEL或配电公司并网流程前，须将固件重新配置为60 Hz及120/240 V，记录所有参数变更，并从ILAC认可实验室取得在60 Hz下的IEC 62116防孤岛测试证据。在最终确定设备合规包前，请直接在controlrecursosyenergia.gob.ec核实现行ARCERNNR微型发电法规及CNEL并网技术条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 厄瓜多60 Hz / 120/240 V分相電網要求逆變器韌體完全重新配置並重新測試——這是工程要求，而非文件差距。基於50 Hz的中國併網文件不滿足ARCERNNR或CNEL厄瓜多併網要求。在推進ARCERNNR及相關CNEL或配電公司併網流程前，須將韌體重新配置為60 Hz及120/240 V，記錄所有參數變更，並從ILAC認可實驗室取得在60 Hz下的IEC 62116防孤島測試證據。在最終確定設備合規包前，請直接在controlrecursosyenergia.gob.ec核實現行ARCERNNR微型發電法規及CNEL併網技術條件。

requirement_topic.en: ARCERNNR Microgeneración Programme — Distributed PV Grid Connection and Net-Metering
requirement_topic.zh: ARCERNNR微型发电计划——分布式光伏并网及净电量计量
requirement_topic.zht: ARCERNNR微型發電計畫——分散式光伏併網及淨電量計量

summary.en: ARCERNNR regulates distributed grid-connected solar PV under Ecuador's microgeneración framework, which allows residential and commercial customers to install grid-tied PV systems and export surplus electricity under a net-metering or net-billing arrangement. Key requirements include: (a) installation by a qualified professional (technician or engineer registered with ARCERNNR or the relevant provincial body); (b) inverter compliance with applicable INEN technical standards and IEC standards for safety and anti-islanding; (c) a formal connection application to the relevant distribution company (CNEL EP or regional distributor) including technical documentation of the inverter and installation; (d) bidirectional meter installation by the distribution company; (e) technical inspection and approval before energisation. Chinese PV inverters supplied to Ecuador microgeneración projects must satisfy INEN conformity requirements and the distribution company's technical connection conditions, including operation at 60 Hz / 120/240 V.
summary.zh: ARCERNNR依据厄瓜多尔微型发电框架监管分布式并网太阳能光伏，允许居民和商业用户安装并网光伏系统，并通过净电量计量或净电量结算安排向电网出售剩余电力。主要要求包括：（a）由在ARCERNNR或相关省级机构登记注册的合格专业人员（技术员或工程师）安装；（b）逆变器符合适用的INEN技术标准及安全和防孤岛IEC标准；（c）向相关配电公司（CNEL EP或区域配电商）提交正式并网申请，包括逆变器和装置的技术文件；（d）由配电公司安装双向电表；（e）通电前进行技术检查并获批准。供应至厄瓜多尔微型发电项目的中国光伏逆变器须满足INEN合格评定要求及配电公司的技术接入条件，包括在60 Hz / 120/240 V下运行。
summary.zht: ARCERNNR依據厄瓜多微型發電框架監管分散式併網太陽能光伏，允許居民和商業用戶安裝併網光伏系統，並通過淨電量計量或淨電量結算安排向電網出售剩餘電力。主要要求包括：（a）由在ARCERNNR或相關省級機構登記注冊的合格專業人員（技術員或工程師）安裝；（b）逆變器符合適用的INEN技術標準及安全和防孤島IEC標準；（c）向相關配電公司（CNEL EP或區域配電商）提交正式併網申請，包括逆變器和裝置的技術文件；（d）由配電公司安裝雙向電表；（e）通電前進行技術檢查並獲批准。供應至厄瓜多微型發電項目的中國光伏逆變器須滿足INEN合格評定要求及配電公司的技術接入條件，包括在60 Hz / 120/240 V下運行。

standards_or_laws: ARCERNNR microgeneración resolutions and technical regulations (distributed solar grid connection and net-metering framework)
CNEL EP and regional distribution-company technical connection conditions for microgeneración
NTE INEN technical standards applicable to PV inverters (INEN conformity required for market entry)
IEC 62116 — Anti-islanding test procedure (must be validated at 60 Hz for Ecuador)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent programme. Distributed solar connection in China is governed by National Energy Administration (NEA) distributed PV policies and grid operator (State Grid, Southern Power Grid) connection rules, which reference China's domestic standards (NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, GB/T 19964-2024) and are based on 50 Hz / 220/380 V grid conditions. These Chinese distributed connection rules are not applicable in Ecuador and do not give any presumption of compliance with ARCERNNR microgeneración equipment requirements or CNEL connection conditions.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接对应的计划。中国分布式太阳能并网受国家能源局（NEA）分布式光伏政策及电网运营商（国家电网、南方电网）接入规则管理，引用中国国内标准（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024），基于50 Hz / 220/380 V电网条件。上述中国分布式并网规则不适用于厄瓜多尔，不给予ARCERNNR微型发电设备要求或CNEL接入条件的任何合规推定。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接對應的計畫。中國分散式太陽能併網受國家能源局（NEA）分散式光伏政策及電網運營商（國家電網、南方電網）接入規則管理，引用中國國內標準（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024），基於50 Hz / 220/380 V電網條件。上述中國分散式併網規則不適用於厄瓜多，不給予ARCERNNR微型發電設備要求或CNEL接入條件的任何合規推定。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese inverters for Ecuador microgeneración projects must be configured for 60 Hz / 120/240 V operation, satisfy INEN conformity requirements, and pass the relevant CNEL or distribution-company technical review as part of the microgeneración connection application. Chinese distributed solar connection approvals (NEA policy, State Grid/Southern Power Grid rules) do not transfer to Ecuador ARCERNNR microgeneración requirements. Confirm inverter 60 Hz / 120/240 V reconfiguration, INEN conformity certificate, IEC safety and anti-islanding evidence, and registration of the installing technician or engineer with the relevant CNEL or distribution company before committing product to Ecuador microgeneración projects.
gap.zh: 差距：用于厄瓜多尔微型发电项目的中国逆变器须配置为60 Hz / 120/240 V运行，满足INEN合格评定要求，并作为微型发电并网申请的一部分通过相关CNEL或配电公司技术审查。中国分布式太阳能并网审批（NEA政策、国家电网/南方电网规则）不能转移至厄瓜多尔ARCERNNR微型发电要求。在将产品用于厄瓜多尔微型发电项目前，请向相关CNEL或配电公司确认逆变器60 Hz / 120/240 V重新配置、INEN合格证书、IEC安全和防孤岛证据及安装技术员或工程师的注册状态。
gap.zht: 差距：用於厄瓜多微型發電項目的中國逆變器須配置為60 Hz / 120/240 V運行，滿足INEN合格評定要求，並作為微型發電併網申請的一部分通過相關CNEL或配電公司技術審查。中國分散式太陽能併網審批（NEA政策、國家電網/南方電網規則）不能轉移至厄瓜多ARCERNNR微型發電要求。在將產品用於厄瓜多微型發電項目前，請向相關CNEL或配電公司確認逆變器60 Hz / 120/240 V重新配置、INEN合格證書、IEC安全和防孤島證據及安裝技術員或工程師的登記狀態。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all distributed solar grid-connection projects under ARCERNNR's microgeneración framework; 60 Hz / 120/240 V inverter configuration and CNEL/distribution-company technical review are non-negotiable project gates
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese distributed solar connection approvals are granted under China NEA policy and grid operator rules at 50 Hz / 220/380 V — not transferable to Ecuador

source.publisher: ARCERNNR (Agencia de Regulación y Control de Energía y Recursos Naturales No Renovables)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ARCERNNR microgeneración is a separate project and equipment approval gate from any Chinese domestic distributed solar approval. Inverters must be reconfigured and tested for 60 Hz / 120/240 V operation before any INEN or ARCERNNR submission. Confirm inverter model eligibility, INEN conformity status, IEC safety and anti-islanding evidence, and the registration of the installing engineer with the relevant CNEL or distribution company before project submission. Verify current ARCERNNR microgeneración regulations and CNEL connection technical requirements directly at controlrecursosyenergia.gob.ec.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ARCERNNR微型发电是独立于任何中国国内分布式太阳能审批的项目和设备审批门槛。在提交INEN或ARCERNNR申请前，逆变器须重新配置并测试为60 Hz / 120/240 V运行。在项目提交前，请向相关CNEL或配电公司确认逆变器型号资格、INEN合格状态、IEC安全和防孤岛证据及安装工程师的注册状态。请直接在controlrecursosyenergia.gob.ec核实现行ARCERNNR微型发电法规及CNEL并网技术要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ARCERNNR微型發電是獨立於任何中國國內分散式太陽能審批的項目和設備審批門檻。在提交INEN或ARCERNNR申請前，逆變器須重新配置並測試為60 Hz / 120/240 V運行。在項目提交前，請向相關CNEL或配電公司確認逆變器型號資格、INEN合格狀態、IEC安全和防孤島證據及安裝工程師的登記狀態。請直接在controlrecursosyenergia.gob.ec核實現行ARCERNNR微型發電法規及CNEL併網技術要求。
